/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/pna_nic.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pna_nic.dir/thrift/src/PnaNic_server.cpp.o -o pna_nic  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: ../../src/bm_runtime/libbmruntime.a ../../thrift_src/libruntimestubs.a libpnanic.a libpnanic_thrift.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/local/lib/libthrift.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxxhash.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnanomsg.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcap.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5
